heading: Separability of certain provisions of this chapter
label: 1831 Separability of certain provisions of this chapter
text: The provisions of this chapter limiting the insurance of the deposits of any depositor to a maximum less than the full amount shall be independent and separable from each and all of the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsSection is derived from subsec. (z) of former . See Codification note set out under .section 264 of this titlesection 1811 of this title
